description: Help lookup (?/m): formatted-scroller help, lookup category menu, then msgwin-get-line input push

messages.text:
<yellow>Dungeon Crawl Help<lightgrey>                       <yellow>Manual Contents<lightgrey>
                                         
Press one of the following keys to       <white>*<lightgrey>       Table of contents
obtain more information on a certain     <white>A<lightgrey>.      Overview
aspect of Dungeon Crawl.                 <white>B<lightgrey>.      Starting Screen
<white>?<lightgrey>: List of commands                      <white>C<lightgrey>.      Attributes and Stats
<white>^<lightgrey>: Quickstart Guide                      <white>D<lightgrey>.      Exploring the Dungeon
<white>:<lightgrey>: Browse character notes                <white>E<lightgrey>.      Experience and Skills
<white>#<lightgrey>: Browse character dump                 <white>F<lightgrey>.      Monsters
<white>~<lightgrey>: Macros help                           <white>G<lightgrey>.      Items
<white>&<lightgrey>: Options help                          <white>H<lightgrey>.      Spellcasting
<white>%<lightgrey>: Table of aptitudes                    <white>I<lightgrey>.      Targeting
<white>/<lightgrey>: Lookup description                    <white>J<lightgrey>.      Religion
<white>Q<lightgrey>: FAQ                                   <white>K<lightgrey>.      Mutations
<white>V<lightgrey>: Version information                   <white>L<lightgrey>.      Licence, Contact, History
<white>!<lightgrey>: Display diagnostics                   <white>M<lightgrey>.      Macros, Options, Performance
<white>Home<lightgrey>: This screen                        <white>N<lightgrey>.      Philosophy
                                         <white>1<lightgrey>.      List of Character Species
                                         <white>2<lightgrey>.      List of Character Backgrounds
                                         <white>3<lightgrey>.      List of Skills
                                         <white>4<lightgrey>.      List of Keys and Commands
                                         <white>5<lightgrey>.      Inscriptions
                                         <white>6<lightgrey>.      Dungeon sprint modes

messages.more: <lightgrey>[<white>Up<lightgrey>|<white>Down<lightgrey>] select  [<white>PgDn<lightgrey>|<white>><lightgrey>] page down  [<white>PgUp<lightgrey>|<white><<<lightgrey>] page up  [<white>Esc<lightgrey>] exit<lightgrey>        <lightgrey>[<white>XXX<lightgrey>]<lightgrey>

messages.prompt:
<cyan>Describe a monster; partial names and regexps are fine. Enter a single letter
to list monsters displayed by that symbol.
Describe what?
